win_condition: After final delivery and end-game scoring, highest VP wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with more money wins; if still tied, share victory.

categories.label: Trail Progress / Certificates
categories.description: VP from deliveries and station master tile effects as scored in endgame categories.

categories.label: Buildings
categories.description: VP from owned building tiles per their printed/earned values.

categories.label: Teepees
categories.description: VP from collected teepees and related bonuses.

categories.label: Objective Cards
categories.description: VP from completed objective cards (with penalties for uncompleted objectives if applicable).

categories.label: Cattle Cards
categories.description: VP from breeding value and end-game cattle card scoring.

categories.label: Stations
categories.description: VP from station master track and station tiles.
